scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{const r=require('child_process').spawnSync(process.execPath,['../../scripts/run-patch-package.js'],{encoding:'utf8'});if(r.status===0){if(r.stdout)process.stdout.write(r.stdout);if(r.stderr)process.stderr.write(r.stderr)}else{console.log('patch script not available, skip')}}catch(e){console.log('patch script not available, skip')}"
